title: The Thyolo Alethe: An Endangered Bird Found Only in Malawi's Last Forests
meta_title: Thyolo Alethe Endangered Bird: Where to See It in Malawi
meta_description: The Thyolo Alethe is an endangered bird with fewer than 4,000 left. Learn where to spot this rare species in Thyolo's last forest fragments.
author: The Thyolo House
excerpt: Fewer than 4,000 Thyolo Alethes survive in the wild, making this shy forest bird one of Africa's most endangered species. The last fragments of mid-altitude forest clinging to private tea estates in Thyolo, Malawi, are its final stronghold — and one of the few places on earth you can still see it.
content:
